I immediately  believed it was a scam. I had never even been to the town they said I received the surgery in. After speaking with Trey I told him yal have the wrong person and a case of mistaken identity. Trey immediately tried pushing for me to pay the bill of someone else. He even asked “maybe you forgot”. I couldn’t believe it, I forgot I got a plastic surgery done. He tried telling me to get a lawyer when I knew all I needed is the date of the procedure so I could prove I wasn’t even in their town the time of. Trey said he wasn’t at the office even though I called the office phone and said he couldn’t provide the paperwork giving me the date. He kept trying to pressure me to just go ahead and pay before it gets to court. When I told him why are you being so stand offish he said “we got the right guy” and “we’ll see buddy.” Then hung up on me. Never provided any date of operation or paperwork. Then after calling the surgeons office I explained to them they had the wrong person. I asked if they would provide me the date of the surgery so I can provide proof I was not even in town. She said she could not even though they were telling me it was me for sure. I had to send my I.d to them to realize they had the wrong person. Then I called Trey Lavesphere and said the doctors office said you got the wrong guy to which he replied we won’t bother you anymore. NO APOLOGY or anything. What a low life unprofessional uncourteous individual. I even had to have the court contact his agency to get me off the lawsuit. STAY AWAY from Trey Lavesphere and his so called law firm the Texas Sphere who don’t even double check their work. Get yourselves professional liable help.

reviews.text: Bill is the Best! Fast and efficient!

The owner never contacted me so I was referred to Bill Wells.  I am not one to Sue but did not feel I should pay for my medical expenses.  Bill was kind, understanding, and gave me a lot of helpful information.   He handled everything with the upmost professionalism.  The whole process was easy and stress free for me. Yes, unfortunately, our schedule for litigated/contested matters has gotten very full towards the end of the year, and we can't always guarantee that we can take on a new litigated case. reviews.text:
Ryan Zapalac has been an invaluable ally in my legal journey, offering not just expert legal representation but also honest and transparent guidance. From the beginning, Ryan gave me a fair estimate of his fees and assured me that if he didn’t use the full amount of the retainer, he would refund the difference—demonstrating his commitment to fairness and integrity. His upfront approach and clear communication about costs set him apart, providing me with peace of mind and confidence that I was in good hands.

Ryan consistently gives the best advice, and what truly sets him apart is his willingness to admit when he doesn’t have all the answers. He isn’t afraid to say, “I don’t know,” and is quick to refer you to other attorneys if it means getting you the help you need. This honesty and humility are rare qualities in the legal world and show his genuine commitment to his clients’ best interests.

Beyond his exceptional legal skills, Ryan brings a fascinating and diverse background to the table, including fluency in multiple languages, which reflects his broad perspective and unique approach to his practice. Not only is he an outstanding attorney, but he also takes the time to understand his clients' needs on a personal level, offering support and insight that extends beyond the courtroom.

Ryan’s calm demeanor and strategic thinking made me feel secure throughout my case, and his vast knowledge and skill set proved to be crucial in navigating the complexities of the legal process. If you are looking for a lawyer who combines expertise, transparency, and an impressive personal background, Ryan Zapalac is the attorney you want by your side. His commitment to his clients and his genuine, approachable nature make him truly exceptional.

Thank you, Ryan, for your guidance, honesty, and dedication. Your work has made a significant impact, and I am grateful to have had you in my corner.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jacqueline, thank you for taking the time to write such a nice review! It was a pleasure speaking with you and I hope we have the opportunity to work with you in the future again...in a less stressful matter, of course!

reviews.text: We had an issue recovering our security deposit from a lease. We sent all the info to Ryan, he immediately reviewed it, saw we were in a good position, explained what he could do about it, what the cost would be and then, with our blessing proceeded. He sent a very professionally worded demand letter to our former landlord quoting which Texas laws applied to our situation and what the path forward would be if the deposit was not refunded. On the morning that the letter was sent (via email) Ryan received an immediate response from the landlord with a copy of the certified refund check and proof that it was mailed. We are extremely satisfied with his work.

I hired Mr. Gunn to represent me in my divorce and custody in July 2019. He never answered my emails, phone calls, or questions. He had me come on to prep for court 3 times and cancelled/rescheduled the court date each time so I wasted my time and money having to use vacation days to meet with him. He never seems in a rush to try and get anything moving for my case. He frequently forgot who I was and any details about my kids/situation. Every court document had information missing/wrong and I had to personally go over everything myself for accuracy. When he finally did return a phone call, he thought my divorce was final and said he ceased to be my lawyer when that happened! (Still very much married!) Today, Sept 11, 2020, I received a letter in the mail saying he withdrew himself as my lawyer. I haven’t spoken to him in over a month! Do not waste your money on him. I’m out $2000 and no closer to getting a divorce than I was before.

I would and will continue to recommend Mr. Gunn to anyone seeking legal advice in the Houston area regarding family matters. You are not going to find a better lawyer. He's well respected in court it seems like all of the lawyers knows him.

Where do I start? I was the non-custodial father of 4 daughters from a prior relationship. One of my daughters would not speak to me and I had trouble overcoming the enormous obstacles that non-custodial fathers face in this world regarding my children. David Gunn's office built a team that helped me .. a guy.. the non custodial father obtain primary custody of the daughter that wanted to live with me.

Additionally, his office helped me to repair the heavily damaged relationship that I had with the daughter who would not speak to me before. Everything I had ever been told is that men have no rights or chances in family court. David Gunn proved to me that we are all equal under the law with actual, measurable results.

I would be doing a great disservice to his office if I did not also mention Mrs. Rutledge. She helped me to stay focused emotionally on the bigger picture and no matter how hard things seemed at the moment her kind, positive and patient nature with me had a major portion in helping me to keep going.

Thank you, from the bottom of my heart forever, for being the all star team that saved my family.

David got me primary custody of both of my kids from their mother in 2013 and has helped keep it that way ever since.  He is the BEST attorney that you can get for family matters in the Houston area.  He has since gotten 3 of my friends custody of their kids as well and he never gives up!!!

David is a very unreliable slime ball who took my money upfront and did little to nothing for me.... My case was unnecessarily delayed for a year due to needless postponing.... I continuously sent him emails regarding the status of my case,  but he NEVER responded to my emails. VERY VERY UNRESPONSIVE....

I had to settle my own child support with the OAG to get my child support reduced per the new orders. He never took care of it nor did he care to do so.... I spent over 5 hours on the phone with the OAG to get it settled. I asked for mediation for 6 months straight,  but he just kept ignoring me....

Then a week before my mediation appointment he sent me an email notifying me of his intent to withdraw as my attorney of record.... What a JERK.... He took my money and then decided to drop me last minute, knowing I had just been in a major accident requiring surgery, which made me immobile.... I called him to find out the reason for his motion to withdraw as my representing  attorney, and the unprofessional slime ball said he couldn't speak to me and hung up.....

STAY AWAY, STAY AWAY, STAY AWAY FROM THIS RAT.... $3,000.00 thrown away....

SLIME BALL....

P.S. I went to mediation today and was able to finalize my case without an attorney....

My first phone call I was directed to speak with Katherine, their paralegal. She referred me to attorney James Nebout. Katherine and James listened to me and were extremely patient. My relationship with the firm became my lifeline. The entire staff always had my back, kept me informed and prepared during the process. Trusting their experience and turning everything over to them was EXACTLY what I needed to care for myself and my husband. In conclusion, my case was resolved in a timely fashion and I was awarded $500,000.00. Much more than my expectation. My husband and I cannot thank James, Theresa Lynn, Katherine and the entire firm enough. I give them 10 stars.  I highly recommend burwell and Nebout Trail Lawyers...Lynn

I was involved in an accident, in a parking lot.   A person turning into the parking lot crossed into my lane and hit me head on. Many attorneys would refuse to take a case like this, because it is very hard to establish who is at fault.  I had pictures and documentation explaining how the accident took place, and I took them to The Law Offices of Scott C. Lannie.  Scott Lannie took my case, because I had really good evidence, and he was able to win my case.  He is a smart and dedicated attorney, who helps you to understand the court’s procedures, and makes sure that you know what exactly what to expect.  I am very happy with the way that he handled my case, and I strongly recommend him to anyone!

reviews.text:
****Please stay away from this company for any of your legal matters they will rip you off*******I had a disappointing and unethical experience working with this firm. In my case, I found the communication unclear and the overall process lacked transparency. I also experienced unexpected fees through a referral arrangement, which I wish had been better explained upfront.

Based on my experience, I would strongly recommend anyone engaging with them to ask detailed questions about the fee structure, referral terms, and expected timelines before signing any agreement. I with i could have handled the matter directly with my insurance provider, which might have turned out to be a smoother experience. AVOID this company as much as possible.
----------------------------
Below is my response to what this firm says they are tranparent and for this Fact they have i have never recieved a response.

Below email sent which i never got a response for ---

If your intent is truly righteous, then please respond directly to the points I’ve raised below.
I stand by every word I’ve said and will continue to do so.

As stated in your own agreement:

“Forty percent (40%) of any settlement proceeds, court awarded proceeds, or any payments made after the commencement of representation… (attorney is owed nothing if unable to obtain settlement proceeds or court awarded proceeds on behalf of client).”

This clearly means the 40% contingency applies only to proceeds obtained after your representation began. The portion covering repairs I completed before your involvement — specifically the tree removal ($7700) and fence repair ($6000) — does not fall under that definition

Another email which i never got a response yet.----

Can you please clarify where in the documentation it shows that these items fall under my deductible? Based on your disbursement sheet, it appears to be a flat calculation, while my deductible is $7,600, not $13,700. The additional amount represents out-of-pocket expenses I personally covered before your firm’s involvement.

You’ve stated that these amounts were removed from the fee calculation, yet no supporting figures or breakdown have been provided. Please share documentation reflecting where and how the $13,700 was excluded.

I am not seeking any favor or additional payment — I’m simply asking for a transparent and factual reconciliation based on our agreement. Thus far, no data from your side has addressed these points directly.
---------------------------
If you don't respect your terms then yes i have right to go to Texas Bar or who so ever can make you understand above clause.
---------------------------
reviews.ownerResponse: The terms of the Agreement were simple and in plain English.  We are also one of the few firms that will reduce our contingency fee up front if the insured has a contract with a public adjuster.  Mr. Yadav was aware of this and agreed to it.  I will also say that he has been in breach of this agreement by not providing a forwarding address when he went back to India.  He has refused until we include a bigger payout for him than what he contractually agreed to. He has also threatened to file a complaint with the Texas Bar unless we comply with his demands.  Just another person who wants to manipulate after the fact and post bad reviews to pressure others to get what they want.  I can't negotiate with terrorists, I ethically do not believe that is the right thing to do.

reviews.text: I have worked with this firm for years when it comes to getting my clients paid for their insurance claim.  I cannot recommend any attorney firm more than Chad T. Our case had to go to mediation prior to going to trial and once again Amanda and team made the mediation process very easy.  They explained the process and what role we would play. Amanda successfully argued our case and we received a very good outcome from the mediation and settled our case with our insurance company to our satisfaction.  I would highly recommend using Amanda and her team.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Castano:

The Texas Rules Of Professional Conduct prohibit me from knowlingly "[Using] confidential information of a former client to the disadvantage of the former client after the representation is concluded unless...the confidential information has become generally known."

You have made it generally known that you had previously hired me. Allow me to now clarify: I last represented you in 2019. You have not been a client of mine in the last four years since then.

You have accused me of being hired by a “defendant party” to testify against you. Allow me to clarify: I have not been hired by anyone to testify against you. Nor have I testified against you.

The attorney-client privilege generally prohibits me from revealing the confidential information of ANY CLIENT. However, the Texas Rules Of Professional Conduct state “A lawyer may reveal confidential information: …(4) When the lawyer has reason to believe it is necessary to do so in order to comply with a court order…”

Allow me to clarify: This year I was subpoenaed on several occasions to testify about your confidential information, and I fought the subpoenas each time, at my own expense. Only recently has a Texas judge indicated that they will sign a court order forcing me to reveal a limited amount of your confidential information. That is not me being “hired”, that is me being “ordered”.

Attorney-Client privilege prohibits me from otherwise divulging the contents of our communications during my time as your attorney four years ago. I will only say: If I was free to fully respond, I am confident the public would reach a different conclusion.

I wish you the best of luck.

Psalm : 109
Hold not thy peace, O God of my praise;

2 For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceitful are opened against me: they have spoken against me with a lying tongue.

3 They compassed me about also with words of hatred; and fought against me without a cause.

4 For my love they are my adversaries: but I give myself unto prayer.

5 And they have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.

6 Set thou a wicked man over him: and let Satan stand at his right hand.

7 When he shall be judged, let him be condemned: and let his prayer become sin.

8 Let his days be few; and let another take his office.

9 Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.

10 Let his children be continually vagabonds, and beg: let them seek their bread also out of their desolate places.

11 Let the extortioner catch all that he hath; and let the strangers spoil his labour.

12 Let there be none to extend mercy unto him: neither let there be any to favour his fatherless children.

13 Let his posterity be cut off; and in the generation following let their name be blotted out.

14 Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered with the Lord; and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.

15 Let them be before the Lord continually, that he may cut off the memory of them from the earth.

16 Because that he remembered not to shew mercy, but persecuted the poor and needy man, that he might even slay the broken in heart.

17 As he loved cursing, so let it come unto him: as he delighted not in blessing, so let it be far from him.

18 As he clothed himself with cursing like as with his garment, so let it come into his bowels like water, and like oil into his bones.

19 Let it be unto him as the garment which covereth him, and for a girdle wherewith he is girded continually.

20 Let this be the reward of mine adversaries from the Lord, and of them that speak evil against my soul.

21 But do thou for me, O God the Lord, for thy name's sake: because thy mercy is good, deliver thou me.

22 For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.

23 I am gone like the shadow when it declineth: I am tossed up and down as the locust.

24 My knees are weak through fasting; and my flesh faileth of fatness.

25 I became also a reproach unto them: when they looked upon me they shaked their heads.

26 Help me, O Lord my God: O save me according to thy mercy:

27 That they may know that this is thy hand; that thou, Lord, hast done it.

28 Let them curse, but bless thou: when they arise, let them be ashamed; but let thy servant rejoice.

29 Let mine adversaries be clothed with shame, and let them cover themselves with their own confusion, as with a mantle.

30 I will greatly praise the Lord with my mouth; yea, I will praise him among the multitude.

31 For he shall stand at the right hand of the poor, to save him from those that condemn his soul.

reviews.text:
A dismissal on a legal case is a significant event that is often a cause for relief. While it means the charges or claims are no longer pending against you, the exact consequences depend on whether the dismissal was "with prejudice" or "without prejudice".
With prejudice
A dismissal with prejudice means the case is permanently closed, and the prosecution or opposing party cannot refile the same charges or lawsuit against you. This is the most definitive form of dismissal and a final resolution to the matter.
Reasons for this type of dismissal can include:
Lack of evidence: The prosecution or plaintiff may lack the necessary evidence to proceed and cannot fix the issue.

UPDATE  MAY -15 -2024
[ Let me update you on this case I'd like a Thorne in my side which cut a lot of careers I am trade to do but to have an expunge record ( records removed from client's background) makes the difference like night in day.

Then one day I hot an email from them and it was a good one.
They had everything signed from all the court houses and judge.
They sent me the documents to my address inTennessee.
Not one time I had to step foot in Texas for those concerns but now when I visit thanks to them.
I love Texas n I live Tennessee lol

But you know who I love ❤️
The law offices of Antonio Benavides ❤️]

I had a case that needed to be dealt with out of state because I no longer reside in Texas.
You see, I had false charges brought up against me and was kicked out my own home which resulted in me to quit my job and rebuild my life in Tennessee, where I have a supportive family to get me through this ordeal.
I came across The Law Office of Antonio Benavides who was able to get to motion favor of representing me, so I dont have to return back to Texas.
He gave me a plan of action to follow through with, (which I did) that really saved me the time of a case that could've been handled a while ago.
On my way out the municipal court house, I  started walking back towards my car, and low in behold, Antonio Benavides was catching a bus.
I hurried up and found my car but before I can try to offer him a ride to who knows, maybe another court house he was gone.
I stayed at a hotel for the night before I made my long 11 hour  trip back to Tennessee.
Of course I could've went through Dallas which would've shaved off 2 hours but I have relatives along Louisiana and Mississippi so that's the way I went.
My whole drive back I thought about Antonio,  and how dedicated he was to really go out his way to do what it takes to get the job done.
If I had any concerns that I had the right team representing me, well that all went away that day.
I knew I WAS IN GOOD HANDS, HANDS DOWN with The Law Offices of Antonio Benavides.
I don't think there are many law firms out there like his because to me they are a unicorn of law firms. My case was dismissed before trial and now I can move forward with my life.

Valerie,

I’m sorry that my law firm was not able to take your case. You are correct that the Linebaugh Law Firm focuses and specializes in helping people injured in commercial vehicle crashes. This includes crashes involving large trucks and busses, as well as company cars, trucks, and vans. In fact, I have written a book about the subject, entitled “9 Costly Mistakes that People Make Following an 18-Wheeler Crash.”

Even so, my office is always happy to talk to anyone about questions they may have after a crash or other injury. If anyone contacts our office with a case outside our specialty, my staff will always provide the name and number of another attorney who can help them.

Again, I am very sorry that we were unable to take your case. If you would like to discuss this further, please give my office a call at 281-422-0505 and ask for Dan. I would be happy to speak with you.

-Dan Linebaugh

June 3rd of 2022 while driving a freight train, I slammed into a loaded tractor trailer that was parked on the track in Houston Texas. After the incident I had to get some work done on my lower back due to the hard impact. I missed a total of 93 days of work. While getting therapy & was really worried about how I was going to pay my bills while being off during therapy & rehabilitation. I contacted McGuire Injury Law & just from the phone conversation I was able to breathe a sigh of relief. Jeff McGuire which is the attorney I spoke with was fabulous. Over a series of phone calls as well as meetings he worked with me by pointing me in the right direction as far as which doctors could help me best. The law firm offered financial support while I was off & it was offered at a very reasonable repay rate if I needed it. I wasn't expecting to get a whole lot of money. All I was really concerned with was getting my lost wages as well as my medical bills paid. I spent a total of 93 days in and out of different doctors offices and rehabilitation centers that worked on my lower back and when all was said done Jeff McGuire contacted the trucking companies insurance and explained to them all that had happened as well as what I was out financially and low and behold the trucking company totally agreed with the amount we requested. After medical bills and attorneys fees I put some money in my pocket pay all medical bills and go back to work. Jeff was great. Very informative as well as understanding about my concerns. If you or anyone you know is in need of a personal injury lawyer, I highly highly highly recommend McGuire Injury Law.

My life changed when I met McGuire injury law firm unfortunately it was because I had been injured in a job setting. My family and I were in fear of how we would be able to survive. I first heard about Clint when I was working with his father on the Railroad in 2009. I was told that he was a better Attorney than Steve Young, who at the time was the Top FELA Railroad Attorney. Forward to August 2018 where I was involved in a Limo accident while on duty. A couple of days later the injury got worse and I went and saw a doctor, who advised to go see a back specialist. I was placed on injury by the company and I was advised to contact an Attorney to protect myself for having a on the job injury. I got Clint's office number and called. Clint took my call and gave me good advice on what to be prepared for and how to handle to complications that come from being injured. I found Clint to be very well versed in FELA cases and the National Agreements, Clint advised that I was eligible for OTVA payments and helped me get them when the Union didn't know how to apply for them and the company played dumb. It finally took a threat of filing suit to get what was contractually owed to me.
Clint was there every step of the way, (as was his Staff) he always answered my telephone calls, emails and texts. He would check in on me and kept me informed of the status of everything going on in my case. When it came time for depositions, Clint prepped me for my testimony and I was more prepared than I have ever been to testify.  After almost (3) years, (3) Major surgeries and (8) injections we went to mediation and much to my satisfaction we settled.
Clint is honest, truthful and has great integrity, he is fearless when it comes to taking on big Corporations and protecting his Clients.
I am proud to call him my Friend.

Michael Jauch

Psalm : 109
Hold not thy peace, O God of my praise;

2 For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceitful are opened against me: they have spoken against me with a lying tongue.

3 They compassed me about also with words of hatred; and fought against me without a cause.

4 For my love they are my adversaries: but I give myself unto prayer.

5 And they have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.

6 Set thou a wicked man over him: and let Satan stand at his right hand.

7 When he shall be judged, let him be condemned: and let his prayer become sin.

8 Let his days be few; and let another take his office.

9 Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.

10 Let his children be continually vagabonds, and beg: let them seek their bread also out of their desolate places.

11 Let the extortioner catch all that he hath; and let the strangers spoil his labour.

12 Let there be none to extend mercy unto him: neither let there be any to favour his fatherless children.

13 Let his posterity be cut off; and in the generation following let their name be blotted out.

14 Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered with the Lord; and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.

15 Let them be before the Lord continually, that he may cut off the memory of them from the earth.

16 Because that he remembered not to shew mercy, but persecuted the poor and needy man, that he might even slay the broken in heart.

17 As he loved cursing, so let it come unto him: as he delighted not in blessing, so let it be far from him.

18 As he clothed himself with cursing like as with his garment, so let it come into his bowels like water, and like oil into his bones.

19 Let it be unto him as the garment which covereth him, and for a girdle wherewith he is girded continually.

20 Let this be the reward of mine adversaries from the Lord, and of them that speak evil against my soul.

21 But do thou for me, O God the Lord, for thy name's sake: because thy mercy is good, deliver thou me.

22 For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.

23 I am gone like the shadow when it declineth: I am tossed up and down as the locust.

24 My knees are weak through fasting; and my flesh faileth of fatness.

25 I became also a reproach unto them: when they looked upon me they shaked their heads.

26 Help me, O Lord my God: O save me according to thy mercy:

27 That they may know that this is thy hand; that thou, Lord, hast done it.

28 Let them curse, but bless thou: when they arise, let them be ashamed; but let thy servant rejoice.

29 Let mine adversaries be clothed with shame, and let them cover themselves with their own confusion, as with a mantle.

This firm had done legal work for my wife’s aunt and uncle.  As their health began to fail, we realized they did not have powers of attorney.  Since we are the only family they have, we felt it was necessary to get these documents in place.  The aunt and uncle agreed with this, so we contacted Mr. Mayo’s office about this.  We explained the urgency to them on a Monday.  On Wednesday, via teleconference, they confirmed their choices, and the same day the document were prepared.  As the uncle is bedridden, the office staff arranged to come the the house to have the POA’s witnessed and notarized.  By Thursday, everything was done.

The cooperation we received from Mayo & Poland was exceptional.  Kim was instrumental in handling all the details.  Mr. Mayo was very helpful and got things moving.  The urgent need for these documents was reflected in how the office expediently handled everything.  We must especially emphasize their willingness to problem solve to get the documents signed and witnessed by coming to the house.

Years ago, I used Mr. Mayo to draft some documents my parents needed to help preserve their limited wealth as they went through the aging process and attendant expenses. A Will
Financial Power of Attorney
Medical Power of Attorney
HIPAA Authorization

The process was pleasant and we were treated with courtesy and respect. Questions from us were encouraged and then answered completely in clear, easy to understand language – not legal mumbo-jumbo. A large part of this was handled by his paralegal, Sheila McClellan. She made certain that we understood each step of the process and were completely satisfied with the answers we received. She would not let any topic drop until she knew we were satisfied with the explanation. No question was too petty, and no concern went unaddressed.

My wife and I recommend this business without reservation.

This life-changing milestone would not have been possible without the exceptional legal representation provided by the Law Office of Keshab Raj Seadie (LOKRS) and the dedicated efforts of Mr. Ram Dhoj Bista.
From the very first consultation through to the final approval, both Mr. Keshab Raj Seadie and Mr. Bista demonstrated extraordinary professionalism, unwavering dedication, and deep compassion. Despite the complexity and emotional weight of my case, Mr. Seadie took it on with confidence and entrusted Mr. Bista with full responsibility for its management. Mr. Bista approached every detail with meticulous care, carefully reviewed all documentation, guided me through each step, and ensured I was thoroughly prepared for the interview and submission of evidence.
What truly sets Mr. Seadie and Mr. Bista apart is not only their legal expertise and decades of experience but their genuine commitment to the individuals they serve. They did not treat me merely as a client, but as a human being whose safety and future truly mattered. Mr. Bista’s steady encouragement, empathy, and patience during the most trying moments of this journey gave me strength and hope when I needed it most.
The firm’s staff were equally professional—always responsive, respectful, and efficient. The office environment was consistently welcoming and supportive, which significantly alleviated the stress associated with the process.
Today, I stand in a place of peace and security, and I owe it to this exceptional legal team. For anyone seeking trustworthy, compassionate, and result-driven immigration attorneys, I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Keshab Raj Seadie and his remarkable team.
Thank you for helping me begin a new chapter of my life with dignity and hope.
— Prakash Baral

reviews.text: They did an excellent job on my case, which wasn't a typical case but rather a "crazy USCIS mistake." I went to several lawyers before, and they all told me I had to wait for immigration to decide what to do with my case. Then someone recommended The Fonseca Law Firm, and they gave me hope at the end of it all. After 14 months, I finally have my second green card, but this time without the USCIS error. What I liked most about The Fonseca Law Firm is that they are always willing to help, no matter the time. It's personalized service; it's not like, "Oh, the assistant is handling your case." I highly recommend them 100%.

I started my case with notaries and waited almost four years without a response. After meeting Attorney Fonseca, I obtained my residency in less than four months. Very professional and straightforward. I highly recommend him.

Working with Mr. Fonseca has been a completely different experience from any attorney I’ve dealt with before. He’s straightforward, honest, and truly cares about his clients. He actually follows up personally — and by email — and you never feel like just another case on a desk. That one-on-one attention matters.

His work ethic speaks for itself. He doesn’t make empty promises; he proves his knowledge and career experience by delivering real results. You can tell he’s building an incredible reputation the right way — through professionalism, integrity, and genuine respect for the people he represents.

I 100% recommend Mr. Fonseca. If you want an attorney who’s responsive, reliable, and truly on your side, he’s the one.

First they sent us the paperwork to be signed and motorized BEFORE they even filed the paper work, and didn’t tell us until FOUR months later. We had to resign and notorize the papers. We can never get a clear answer WHEN we can get ahold of someone. I emailed in October asking for an update, and received an email in return stating “we are in receipt of your email and will give you an update shortly.” Flash forward to January, still no update. So I emailed AGAIN, just to be ignored. It’s now February and we have yet to hear back. I’m starting to feel as if when our case is finally settled, there will be nothing to distribute because they’re not doing anything. As it currently stands, I would highly NOT recommend this law firm to anybody, not even my worst enemy.

reviews.text: Laci Rendon was such an incredible trustworthy person to have in my corner. Some of the things she has to go through to help her clients are difficult, stressful, confusing, or overwhelming. Laci is fair - she is good at what she does and she works hard to help you get through divorce, bankruptcy, or other dilemmas that we get into that we can’t get ourselves out of without an expert. She is an involved member of the community.  She is strong, confident, and will represent you well. Take my word for it - I’m not just the dentist across the street - she has become a trusted friend and the one I always recommend when people ask for a lawyer. reviews.text: We had struggled to get a newly turned 18 years old incapacitated son the Medicaid we thought he was entitled to have. Upon turning 18, his adoption Medicaid was terminated and he was placed on Medicaid through SSI. Shortly thereafter, SS called and said that he should be on DAC SS and they changed it. We thought "okay, no big deal" but it was because several weeks later we received a Medicaid cancellation notice because he was no longer on SSI. Repeated trips to local Medicaid offices yielded more forms to fill out: "try this one" we heard more than once. Enter the knowledgeable and magnanimous Les Berry. At the consultation meeting with him he assembled all the facts and stated that our son was indeed eligible for Medicaid, without trying to sell his services. I immediately shifted from consultation to engagement and received Medicaid in about a month. Thank you Les.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your experience! We know how frustrating and confusing the Medicaid process can be, especially when it involves navigating multiple agencies and eligibility changes. We’re so glad Les was able to step in, provide clarity, and get your son the benefits he deserves. Your story is exactly why we do what we do — to help families find peace of mind through knowledgeable and compassionate guidance. We truly appreciate your trust in Your Legacy Legal Care® and are so happy to have been part of your journey!

reviews.text:
We had recently moved from a different state and wanted to update our trust according to Texas law. Our previous lawyer informed us we would just need a simple amendment and it shouldn’t cost us very much. After meeting with an assistant at this company (not an actual lawyer), we were told they’d have to redo our entire trust to the tune of $5000-$8990 depending on which package we wanted. Red flags went up so we decided to contact our previous lawyer who suggested we contact the Texas State bar and shop around for a different company. Thank goodness we did! Our previous lawyer was correct! In fact, our trust was even more secure from our previous state that we would’ve put ourselves in jeopardy had we followed the advice of this company. For a fraction of the cost, we were able to do a simple amendment and secure our trust here in Texas. This company is very expensive, and inaccurate. Shop around, don’t take their word as gospel truth! I would’ve given one star, but instead gave 2 because the assistant was kind and only doing her job.

UPDATE: Thanks for your reply to my review! I can see how some people may require what you stated if they lacked a sound trust to start with, however, had someone from your team looked up a simple law from our previous state, you’d realize our trust was iron clad compared to Texas law and again we would’ve been charged thousands of dollars unnecessarily. Do not be fooled! Wills and trusts are protected by the constitution and are recognized regardless of which state you move from and to. Do your homework! This company is extremely expensive and inaccurate when it came to our case. A simple check of our previous state law would have confirmed this. It’s also not accurate that you need an entire trust redone - that only benefits this company’s pocket, not the consumer.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that our approach didn’t align with your expectations but are happy that you found someone to do what you were looking for. Every family’s situation is unique, and our recommendations are based on Texas law and the comprehensive planning our clients have come to rely on. Our goal is to provide every option to clients so they can make an informed decision about what is best for them.

At our firm, we do not amend estate plans drafted by other attorneys. This is a deliberate decision made to avoid potential legal and liability issues especially since most plans do not meet our standards. Instead, we offer full restatements that allow us to ensure your plan is not only legally sound in Texas, but also aligned with what most of our clients are truly looking for: peace of mind that their loved ones will be taken care of, their assets protected, and court involvement avoided.

Many of our clients come to us because they want to plan for the possibility of long-term care needs, including protecting assets while qualifying for benefits like Medicaid. Others want to ensure their families can avoid costly and time-consuming court processes such as probate and guardianship. In our experience, these goals cannot be reliably accomplished through a simple amendment—especially when the laws vary so much from state to state.

While we understand our services may not be the right fit for everyone, we are committed to providing clear guidance and high-quality legal solutions that go beyond “bare minimum” planning. We appreciate your kind words about our team member and wish you the very best moving forward.

If you’re reading this review and want to ensure your plan truly protects your family, your future, and your legacy—we invite you to schedule a strategy session with our team to learn what your options are. We’re here to help!

reviews.text:
When you need a lawyer, you hire THE BEST, and Tad Nelson & Associates are absolutely that — no question about it!!!

Over Christmas, my entire life was turned upside down by false allegations, which led to misdemeanor charges and a protective order. I was scared, overwhelmed, and honestly didn’t know how I was going to get through it. I called Tad Nelson & Associates Christmas Eve.

From the very beginning, Tad went above and beyond. He gave me his personal cell phone number and answered every call and every text, even during the holidays and on weekends. I never once felt ignored or brushed off — I felt like I mattered.

That Saturday, I met with Tad to complete paperwork. He told me that he and his team would do everything they could to get me home by New Year’s Eve so I could see my family.

On Monday morning, Tad and Amber were already at the courthouse by 8:00 AM, fighting hard to have the charges dropped.

By 1:00 PM that same day, Tad called me and told me my charges were COMPLETELY DISMISSED. I collapsed. I dropped to the ground crying in disbelief. One phone call changed everything — fear, panic, and uncertainty turned into overwhelming relief.

But they weren’t done yet. The false protective order was still keeping me from my family. Tad and Amber refused to stop. Amber fought relentlessly, pushing the court again and again so I could go home.

On New Year’s Eve at 6:30 PM, both Tad and Amber personally called me and told me the words I will never forget: “The orders are signed! You can go home!”

Without Tad Nelson and Amber, I would have been separated from my family for 90 days. Because of them, it took less than 7. They didn’t just do their jobs — they fought for me, believed in me, and gave me my life back.

The love, respect, dedication, and heart that Tad and Amber put into their work is beyond words. Tad and Amber, I know you’re reading this — and I need you to know that I am forever grateful. Thank you for fighting for me when I couldn’t fight for myself. Thank you for bringing me home.

If you are facing criminal charges and feel scared, lost, or alone — call Tad Nelson & Associates. Period.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing such a heartfelt and powerful review. It truly means more than words can express. From the moment you reached out, we knew how urgent and personal this situation was, and our entire focus was on protecting you and getting you back where you belonged, with your family.

Cases like yours remind us why we do this work. When someone is facing false allegations and the system moves too quickly or unfairly, it’s our job to step in, push back, and make sure the truth is heard. Helping you reunite with your child and your family was exactly the outcome we were fighting for, and we’re grateful we were able to do that.

Thank you for trusting us during one of the most difficult moments of your life. We’re honored to have stood beside you, and we wish you nothing but peace and strength moving forward.
- Tad & Amber

reviews.text: Your a lawyer, still part of the system to suppress. Start thinking outside the system and you will do more good that way.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I believe this review is connected to a jury verdict that was returned yesterday in a very serious and emotionally difficult case. I cannot say that with absolute certainty, but given the timing and the nature of the comment, it is a reasonable assumption and my response is written with that understanding in mind.

Cases like this are never easy. When a life has been lost, there is no outcome that truly feels like justice to everyone involved. I fully recognize and deeply respect that the victim’s family is hurting. Their grief is real, and it is something no courtroom result can ever erase. They are in my thoughts and prayers.

As a criminal defense lawyer, my role is not to minimize loss, excuse harm, or ignore pain. My role is to stand between the power of the government and an individual citizen and ensure that the process is fair, lawful, and just. That responsibility exists even when the case is emotionally charged and the stakes are extraordinarily high.

I take that duty seriously. I work hard. I work honestly. And I work relentlessly to ensure that every client receives a defense grounded in the facts, the law, and the Constitution. In this case, my partner Amber and I prepared thoroughly, presented the evidence carefully, and advocated for our client with integrity and respect for the gravity of the situation.

It is important for people reading this to understand a fundamental truth about the justice system: criminal defense attorneys do not decide outcomes. Juries do. Our role is to make sure the jury hears all the evidence and that the law is followed. When a verdict is returned, it reflects the collective judgment of citizens who were tasked with weighing the facts—not indifference to loss or suffering.

I understand that some people will never agree with the work criminal defense lawyers do, no matter how carefully, ethically, or responsibly it is done. That reaction often comes from deep pain, and I accept that as part of this profession.

I could ask for this review to be removed, but I won’t. I believe it is important for the public to see the reality of criminal defense work and the emotional weight that comes with it. One side may feel relief, while another feels anger or grief; and both realities can exist at the same time.

To anyone considering my firm: know that when I take on a case, I do so with seriousness, honesty, and respect for every person involved. I will always work as hard as the law allows, I will always tell the truth, and I will always fight for my client within the bounds of ethics and justice.

And to those who are hurting: I am truly sorry for your pain. I do not take lightly the human cost behind any case. You are in my thoughts and prayers.

— Tad Nelson

I thought once he talked with the witness the case would be dismissed. The next setting the case would have been set on the trial docket. As far as money, you signed a contract written by the State Bar and there is actually a paragraph about return of unearned retainer. Anywho, I am sorry we let you down and totally wish you the best. reviews.text:
I truly cannot put into words how grateful I am for my lawyer and their entire team. After my accident, I was overwhelmed, scared, and unsure of what to do—especially as a newly single mom trying to hold everything together. I had previously hired another lawyer who made me feel like my case didn’t matter. I felt ignored, brushed off, and completely unsupported, and I eventually had to fire them. That experience made an already traumatic situation even more stressful.

From the moment I started working with this firm, everything changed. They treated me with genuine care, compassion, and respect. They didn’t just see me as a case number—they saw me as a human being who was hurting, stressed, and trying to survive. They constantly checked in on me, explained everything in a way I could understand, and made sure I had what I needed every step of the way.

They helped me with paperwork, medical care coordination, and understanding my options, which lifted such a huge weight off my shoulders. They made sure I wasn’t missing appointments, falling behind, or left confused about what was happening. They also helped ease my financial stress, which meant everything to me—especially during the holiday season when money is already tight and emotions are heavy. Knowing they were fighting for me allowed me to focus on my healing and being there for my child.

What meant the most was that I never felt alone. They were patient, kind, and incredibly responsive. They answered every question, reassured me when I was anxious, and truly went above and beyond to make sure I was okay—not just legally, but emotionally too.

If you are looking for a lawyer who will actually care about you, fight for you, and treat you like a person instead of a paycheck, this is the team you want. They restored my faith in what a lawyer should be, and I will always be thankful for them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Carrollynn, thank you for sharing your experience with us. We are truly honored you trusted our team during such a difficult and overwhelming time. Knowing you felt supported, informed, and genuinely cared for means so much to us. Our goal is always to be alongside our clients with compassion and clear guidance so they can focus on healing and their families. We are grateful for your trust and kind words, and we wish you continued strength and brighter days ahead. Thank you!

reviews.text:
I was involved in an auto accident maybe around eight months ago and chose The Carlson Law Firm in Baytown to handle my case. From the beginning, my experience was very positive. Cinthya Sanabria was my first point of contact, and she did an excellent job explaining the process in detail. She guided me through each step of my case, and whenever I had questions or needed clarification, she took the time to break everything down further. She also set clear expectations regarding the estimated timeline of my case.

After the initial details were discussed, my case was transitioned to Madison Bobo, who kept me consistently updated on insurance communications and settlement offers. She ensured I was always informed and aware of what was happening.

Michael Larrieux later became my attorney, and he was very attentive and professional. If any issues arose with my case, he contacted me directly to discuss them. Once we agreed on a course of action, he handled everything efficiently on his end.

Overall, my interactions with everyone involved were smooth, timely, and stress-free. I would give The Carlson Law Firm a five-star review because the process required minimal effort on my part and was handled professionally from start to finish.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience, Aaron. We truly appreciate your trust in The Carlson Law Firm and your kind recommendation. Thank you!

reviews.text: My 81 yr old mother was caught in the middle of a serious multi-vehicle accident in Houston, for which she was hospitalized for a month after requiring emergency surgery. I contacted Carlson Law Firm after a friend had recommended them.  Laura Valtierra & Zachary Smitherman were assigned to my mom's case.  From day one, they showed compassion, thoroughness, & expertise.  They provided timely updates on their progress, & took care of dealing with the insurance companies & numerous medical bills my mom incurred.  They were persistent in  resolving all outstanding claims from medical providers.  Laura & Zachary worked very hard to help us through the chaos after such a traumatic incident for my mother.  I can't thank them & Carlson Law Firm enough for the incredible service & support they provided.  I highly recommend them for handling motor vehicle accident claims!

Top-Notch Legal Support — Highly Recommend!

Working with Attorney James Title was a truly positive experience. He was incredibly knowledgeable, thorough, and always accessible when I had questions. His professionalism and calm demeanor immediately put me at ease, and I felt confident knowing my case was in capable hands. What impressed me most was how he combined legal expertise with genuine care for his clients. He went above and beyond to ensure the best outcome, and I’m so grateful for his guidance and support. If you’re looking for a trustworthy and effective attorney in Houston, James Title is the one to call!

Exceptional Legal Expertise and Service!

I had an outstanding experience working with Attorney James Title. From our very first consultation, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly responsive. He took the time to clearly explain every step of the process, always made sure my daughter and I felt informed and confident, and handled our case with skill and integrity. What really stood out was his personal commitment I never felt like just another client. His attention to detail and dedication made a stressful situation so much easier to navigate. James is an outstanding attorney who goes above and beyond for his clients!   He is easy to talk to and takes time to thoroughly explain every detail, ensuring confidence every step of the way.  I highly recommend James to anyone needing legal assistance!

In December of 2016 I made a terrible choice and decided to drive home from a Christmas Party after drinking. I was pulled over for speeding and arrested for DWI. I was taken to Harris County Jail and spent the next 36 hours shuffling from cell to cell wondering what permanent damage I had done to my life.

On recommendation my wife contacted Thomas Locke to see if he could assist me. After being released from jail Thomas met with us on a Saturday morning to discuss my options and explain the process to me. Being that I had never been arrested this was extremely helpful. Also, it was reassuring to speak with someone who was not judgmental about the mistake I had made.

Over the next several months there were many legal challenges for my case. Thomas was by my side at every hearing and working furiously on my behalf to help me see the resolution of my case in an expeditious manner and the least long-term effects to my criminal record. This included getting me into the Pretrial Diversion Program despite my not meeting the criteria for enrollment.

In July of this year I will got to court for the final time ending this nightmare. The charges against me will be dismissed and soon after the arrest will disappear from my record and it will be as if none of this ever happened.

There is no doubt in my mind that Thomas Locke saved my life and there is no other attorney I would want by my side.

I couldn’t sit for long, couldn’t lift my arm properly, and had to miss weeks of work. The insurance company tried to downplay everything like it was “just soreness.”

That’s when I hired The Patoli Law Firm. Ahsan immediately took control of the case. He gathered my reports, coordinated with my specialists, documented every treatment, and made sure the full impact of my injuries was impossible to ignore. He pushed back hard during negotiations and refused to let them minimize what I went through.

The final settlement covered my surgeries, therapy, lost wages, and future treatment. If you’re seriously injured and need someone who will actually fight for you, Ahsan at The Patoli Law Firm is the one you want in your corner!
